chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT, SUKKUR. Cr. Appeal No.S-10 of 2019. Date. Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For Orders on MA No. 881/2019. 3. For Orders on MA No. 1791/2019. 20-05-2019. Mr. Rab Dino Makwal advocate for appellant. Mr.Muhammad Qayyum Arain advocate for complainant. Mr. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, DPG. The appellant on having been found guilty for offence punishable u/s 302 (b PPC for committing death of Mst. Hakimzadi was convicted sentenced to undergo R.I for ten year with fine of Rs. 200,000/- (Two Lac) to the legal heirs of said deceased which is against the spirit of law simply for the reason that the moment charge of murder for an offence punishable u/s 302 (b) PPC is proved, then accused is liable to be awarded death penalty or imprisonment for life. In these circumstance a notice be issued against the appellant to show cause as to why the conviction of ten years which is awarded to him for offence punishable u/s 302(b)PPC may not be enhanced to imprisonment for life or death. Office is direct to register the notice as suo-moto revision and tag it with main appeal. Adjourned. Judge Nasim/P.A
